next_steps: Leptomeningeal and cortical brain biopsy of affected areas
Immunohistochemical staining for melanocytic markers (S100, HMB-45, Melan-A, MITF)
Full-body PET/CT scan to exclude systemic primary melanoma
Dilated ophthalmologic examination to evaluate for ocular melanocytosis
Repeat lumbar puncture with cytology and cell-free DNA (liquid biopsy) analysis
Multidisciplinary review by neuro-oncology and pathology
